remarks: Set on a picturesque 0.30-acre lot, this ranch-style home is full of potential and waiting for your creative vision. While the home is being sold as-is the possibilities are endless. Whether you're an investor, a builder, or a homeowner with a vision, this property offers the perfect canvas to bring your ideas to life. Situated in a sought-after neighborhood with close proximity to downtown, shopping, beaches and parks, this property pairs endless possibilities with an unbeatable location. In this private road residence has access to a dock on the on the picturesque Saugatuck River where neighbors can go kayaking tubing or simply soak in the serene views
